lore.title: The Pack Rises
lore.setting: After the founding of NumbahWan, Harlay proved himself as the guild's most loyal warrior. RegginA granted him command of his own division - a pack of 13 elite dogs recruited from across the gaming multiverse.

PACK.name: Pack Tactics
PACK.desc: +1/+1 for each other Dog on board

HOWL.name: Battle Howl
HOWL.desc: All Dogs gain +1 ATK this turn

LOYALTY.name: Unbreakable Bond
LOYALTY.desc: Immune to targeting while leader lives

name.th: ฮาร์เลย์ อัลฟ่าแห่งฝูง

cards.description: The undisputed leader. Where Harlay goes, the pack follows. His bark commands armies, his bite ends wars.

special.name: ALPHA COMMAND
special.desc: All Dogs gain +2/+2 and LOYALTY while Harlay is on board

name.th: บอร์ค ผู้ไม่หยุดยั้ง

cards.description: Once Bork starts barking, nothing can stop him. NOTHING. His rage is legendary, his stamina infinite.

special.name: UNSTOPPABLE BORK
special.desc: Cannot be killed by damage. Can only die to effects or when no other Dogs remain.

name.th: สนูท ผู้ติดตาม

cards.description: Snoot can smell enemies three turns before they appear. His nose is registered as a weapon.

special.name: SCENT TRAIL
special.desc: Reveal enemy's next 2 cards in hand

name.th: ชอมเปอร์ส ผู้บังคับใช้

cards.description: Guild rules are simple: Don't mess with Chompers. He's bitten through steel armor.

special.name: IRON BITE
special.desc: Attacks ignore armor and shields

name.th: แพทช์ ผู้รอด

cards.description: Missing an eye, half an ear, and three toes. Still the happiest dog in the pack. Refuses to stay down.

special.name: NEVER GIVE UP
special.desc: Heals 2 HP at end of each turn. Revives once per game with 1 HP.

name.th: ซูม สปีดสเตอร์

cards.description: Faster than loading screens. Zoom has lapped the entire game world twice before breakfast.

special.name: ZOOMIES
special.desc: Attacks twice. Can't be blocked on first attack.

name.th: แทงค์ ผู้ไม่หวั่นไหว

cards.description: A mastiff the size of a small house. Tank doesn't dodge - attacks just bounce off.

special.name: IMMOVABLE OBJECT
special.desc: Reduces all damage taken by 3. Cannot be moved or displaced.

name.th: วิสเกอร์ส ผู้เจ้าเล่ห์

cards.description: Part dog, part cat energy. Whiskers plays mind games that confuse even the smartest enemies.

special.name: MIND GAMES
special.desc: Swap positions with any card on the board. Swap stats with target for 1 turn.

name.th: แชโดว์ ผู้เงียบงัน

cards.description: You never see Shadow coming. You never hear Shadow leaving. You only feel the bite.

special.name: STEALTH STRIKE
special.desc: First attack each turn is guaranteed critical hit. Can't be targeted until attacking.

name.th: ฟลูฟ ผู้นุ่มฟู

cards.description: So fluffy that enemies can't bring themselves to attack. Floof's cuddles heal all wounds.

special.name: HEALING CUDDLES
special.desc: Adjacent allies heal 2 HP per turn. Enemies have 30% chance to skip attack on Floof.

name.th: แฟง ผู้ดุร้าย

cards.description: Fang doesn't play. Fang doesn't fetch. Fang only knows destruction.

special.name: SAVAGE BITE
special.desc: Deal double damage to targets below 50% HP

name.th: พัดเดิลส์ ผู้เพี้ยน

cards.description: Is Puddles a genius or an idiot? Nobody knows. His random actions somehow always work out.

special.name: CHAOTIC GOOD BOY
special.desc: Each turn, trigger a random positive effect

name.th: เร็กซ์ ทหารผ่านศึก

cards.description: Rex has seen a thousand battles. His scars tell stories, his experience guides the young pups.

special.name: BATTLE WISDOM
special.desc: All Dogs cost 1 less energy to play

name.th: สุนัขผู้ซื่อสัตย์

cards.description: A dependable soldier of the pack. Not flashy, but always reliable.

name.th: หน่วยลาดตระเวน

cards.description: Swift and alert, pack scouts keep the territory safe from intruders.

name.th: ลูกสุนัขป่า

cards.description: Young and aggressive. What they lack in size, they make up in ferocity.

name.th: สุนัขเฝ้าบ้าน

cards.description: A good boy doing his job. Bark loud, bite if needed.

name.th: หมาจรจัด

cards.description: Found on the streets, now part of the pack. Every dog deserves a home.

name.th: ปลอกคอสงครามของฮาร์เลย์

cards.description: Forged from the chains of a thousand defeated enemies. Grants the wearer authority over all dogs.

special.name: ALPHA'S AUTHORITY
special.desc: Equipped Dog becomes Alpha. All other Dogs gain LOYALTY.

name.th: กระดูกแห่งแชมป์

cards.description: The legendary bone. Dogs will do ANYTHING to get it. Wars have been fought over this bone.

special.name: THE ULTIMATE FETCH
special.desc: Target Dog attacks immediately. If it kills, draw 2 cards.

name.th: ของเล่นบีบแห่งหายนะ

cards.description: SQUEAK! The noise drives dogs into a frenzy and enemies into madness.

special.name: MADDENING SQUEAK
special.desc: All Dogs gain +2 ATK. All enemies are confused for 1 turn.

name.th: รังฝูง

cards.description: Home base of the pack. Here, wounded dogs rest and pups train for battle.

special.name: SAFE HAVEN
special.desc: All Dogs heal 1 HP per turn. Summon a Guard Dog each turn (max 3).

name.th: พื้นที่ล่า

cards.description: Rich in prey and danger. Dogs who hunt here grow strong and fierce.

special.name: RICH HUNTING
special.desc: Dogs deal +2 damage. When a Dog kills an enemy, gain 1 energy.

name.th: สนามฝึก

cards.description: Where pups become warriors. Rex runs a tight ship here.

special.name: INTENSIVE TRAINING
special.desc: Common and Uncommon Dogs gain +1/+1 when played.

name.th: เสียงหอนของฝูง

cards.description: The call that unites all dogs. When the pack howls as one, nothing can stand against them.

special.name: UNITED HOWL
special.desc: All Dogs attack simultaneously. Each Dog gains +1 ATK per other Dog.

name.th: ไปเก็บมา!

cards.description: Throw something and watch the chaos unfold. Dogs MUST fetch. It's in their DNA.

special.name: IRRESISTIBLE FETCH
special.desc: All Dogs draw a card. Target enemy is distracted and can't attack this turn.

name.th: แกล้งตาย

cards.description: The oldest trick in the book. Enemies fall for it EVERY time.

special.name: CUNNING RUSE
special.desc: Target Dog becomes untargetable until your next turn. Then attack with +3 ATK.

name.th: ขนมรางวัล

cards.description: The best motivation for any dog. Promise of a treat makes them unstoppable.

special.name: MOTIVATED
special.desc: Target Dog gains +2/+2 and attacks immediately.

name.th: ลูบท้อง

cards.description: Every dog's weakness. A good belly rub heals all wounds.

special.name: HEALING RUB
special.desc: Heal target Dog for 4 HP.

name.th: ไปเดินเล่น!

cards.description: Nothing excites a dog more. WALKIES means adventure!

special.name: EXCITED
special.desc: Target Dog gains +2 SPD this turn.

name.th: เลือดแรก

cards.description: The moment Harlay's pack drew first blood in the great guild war. Victory was inevitable after.

special.name: TASTE OF VICTORY
special.desc: If you deal damage first this turn, all Dogs gain +2/+2 permanently.

name.th: การเก็บอันยิ่งใหญ่

cards.description: Legend tells of a ball thrown so far, an entire pack chased it for three days straight.

special.name: LEGENDARY PURSUIT
special.desc: Draw 3 cards. All Dogs gain FETCH until end of turn.

name.th: เสียงหอนยามเที่ยงคืน

cards.description: When the moon is full, the pack's howl can be heard across the entire server.

special.name: RALLYING CRY
special.desc: All Dogs gain +1 ATK. Draw a Dog card from your deck.

name.th: การจัดฝูง

cards.description: When dogs move as one, they become an unstoppable force.

special.name: COORDINATED STRIKE
special.desc: All Dogs attack the same target this turn.

name.th: เวลาขนม

cards.description: The magic words that make every dog sit still. Even in the middle of battle.

special.name: FULL ATTENTION
special.desc: All Dogs heal 2 HP and gain +1 ATK.

name.th: เวลางีบ

cards.description: Even the fiercest warriors need rest. A quick nap restores energy.

special.name: QUICK REST
special.desc: Gain 2 energy next turn.

name.th: ลูกสุนัขผู้กล้า

cards.description: Small but fearless. This pup charges into battle with zero hesitation.

name.th: หมาแก่ขี้บ่น

cards.description: Get off his lawn. Seriously. He WILL bite.

special.name: GET OFF MY LAWN
special.desc: Deal 2 damage to any enemy that enters your side of the board.

name.th: หมาเห่า

cards.description: Won't. Stop. Barking. Ever. It's actually effective psychological warfare.

special.name: ANNOYING BARK
special.desc: Enemy cards have -1 ATK while Yapper is alive.

name.th: หมาง่วง

cards.description: Zzz... *snore* ...huh? Battle? Zzz...

name.th: ลูกหมาหิว

cards.description: Always looking for food. ALWAYS. Will fight for scraps.

name.th: หมาขุด

cards.description: Obsessed with digging. Sometimes finds treasure. Mostly finds dirt.

special.name: DIG UP
special.desc: When played, 30% chance to draw a random Gear card.

name.th: หมาหอน

cards.description: The pack's horn. When Howler howls, everyone knows battle is near.

name.th: หมาดม

cards.description: Can smell enemies from a mile away. Very useful, very wet nose.

special.name: KEEN NOSE
special.desc: Reveal one random card in enemy hand.

name.th: หมากัด

cards.description: Simple dog. See enemy. Bite enemy. Repeat.

name.th: เพื่อนผู้ซื่อสัตย์

cards.description: Will never leave your side. Ever. Even when you go to the bathroom.

name.th: หมาสงคราม

cards.description: Born on the battlefield. Bred for war. Ugly as sin but fierce as ten.

name.th: ปลอกคอเก่า

cards.description: Worn by generations of pack leaders. Carries the wisdom of the ancients.

special.name: ANCESTRAL WISDOM
special.desc: Equipped Dog gains +1/+1 for each turn it survives.

name.th: ของเล่นกัด

cards.description: Stress relief for dogs. Chew on this instead of the furniture.

special.name: STRESS RELIEF
special.desc: Equipped Dog heals 1 HP whenever it takes damage.

name.th: ลูกเทนนิส

cards.description: THE ball. THE one. Dogs will cross oceans for this ball.

name.th: ชามอาหาร

cards.description: Essential equipment for any dog. Keeps them fed and happy.

name.th: ป้ายชื่อ

cards.description: Simple identification. But it means you belong to the pack.

name.th: พายุฝน

cards.description: Dogs hate thunderstorms. HATE them. Everyone hides.

special.name: SCARED DOGS
special.desc: All Dogs gain +2 HP (hiding). All Dogs can't attack this turn.

name.th: บุรุษไปรษณีย์มา

cards.description: THE ENEMY! All dogs go absolutely BERSERK!

special.name: BARK FRENZY
special.desc: All Dogs gain +3 ATK this turn but attack random enemies.

name.th: เวลาอาบน้ำ

cards.description: Nobody wants a bath. But afterwards, everyone feels better.

special.name: CLEAN UP
special.desc: Remove all negative effects from your Dogs. Heal all Dogs for 1 HP.

name.th: ไปหาหมอ

cards.description: The scary place. But necessary for health.

special.name: CHECK UP
special.desc: Heal target Dog to full HP. That Dog can't attack this turn.

name.th: สวนสุนัข

cards.description: Where dogs socialize and train. A happy place.

special.name: SOCIAL TRAINING
special.desc: Dogs played here gain a random ability.

name.th: สุสานรถ

cards.description: Harsh territory. Only the toughest dogs survive here.

special.name: SURVIVAL OF FITTEST
special.desc: Dogs here gain +1 ATK but take 1 damage per turn.

name.th: เตียงอุ่น

cards.description: Every good dog needs a good bed. Rest is important.

special.name: REST SPOT
special.desc: One Dog heals 2 HP per turn while resting here.

name.th: ปลอกคอหนาม

cards.description: For the edgy dogs. Deals damage to anything that touches.

special.name: SPIKY DEFENSE
special.desc: When equipped Dog is attacked, deal 1 damage back.

name.th: นักวิ่งฝูง

cards.description: Marathon runner of the pack. Can run for days without rest.

name.th: ผู้ปกป้องฝูง

cards.description: Will die to protect the pack. That's not a weakness, it's honor.

name.th: นักล่าฝูง

cards.description: Specializes in coordinated takedowns. Never hunts alone.

name.th: สุนัขกู้ภัย

cards.description: Trained to save lives. Has pulled countless allies from the brink.

special.name: RESCUE MISSION
special.desc: Once per game, revive a fallen Dog with 3 HP.

name.th: สุนัขแห่งความยุติธรรม

cards.description: Believes in fair play. Will protect the weak and punish the bullies.

special.name: RIGHTEOUS FURY
special.desc: Deal double damage to enemies that attacked your weakest Dog.

name.th: วิญญาณป่า

cards.description: Part wolf, all wild. Cannot be tamed, only directed.

special.name: FERAL RAGE
special.desc: Gains +1 ATK each time it takes damage. Max +5.

name.th: ฉลาดแบบถนน

cards.description: Grew up in the alleys. Knows every trick in the book.

special.name: STREET SMARTS
special.desc: 50% chance to dodge the first attack each turn.

name.th: ลูกหมาใหม่

cards.description: Fresh from training. Eager to prove themselves.

name.th: หมาขี้กลัว

cards.description: Afraid of everything. But fear makes them FAST.

name.th: กระดูกเก่าเหนื่อย

cards.description: Retired from active duty. Still guards the den entrance.

name.th: สายจูงแห่งคำสั่ง

cards.description: Not a restraint, but a symbol of trust. Who holds the leash leads the pack.

special.name: PACK LEADER
special.desc: Equipped Dog can command other Dogs to attack specific targets.

name.th: ปากเปล่าแห่งความเงียบ

cards.description: For the dogs who bite first and ask questions never.

special.name: RESTRAINED
special.desc: Equipped Dog can't attack. But enemies can't target it either.

name.th: ผ้าพันคอแห่งความกล้า

cards.description: A simple bandana that makes any dog feel invincible.

name.th: กองกระดูก

cards.description: Emergency rations. Every dog needs a buried treasure.

name.th: การซุ่มโจมตีของฝูง

cards.description: Coordinated strike from all angles. The enemy never sees it coming.

special.name: COORDINATED AMBUSH
special.desc: All Dogs attack the same target. Each Dog gains +2 ATK for this attack.

name.th: กระรอกดึงความสนใจ

cards.description: SQUIRREL! Even the most disciplined dog can't resist.

special.name: SQUIRREL!
special.desc: All enemy Dogs skip their next attack. Your Dogs gain +1 SPD.

name.th: เสียงเรียกแห่งป่า

cards.description: An ancient howl that awakens the primal instincts in all dogs.

special.name: PRIMAL CALL
special.desc: All Dogs gain +1/+1 and PACK until end of turn.

name.th: สายตาลูกหมา

cards.description: The ultimate weapon. No one can resist the puppy eyes.

special.name: IRRESISTIBLE
special.desc: Target enemy can't attack this turn. 30% chance they switch sides.

name.th: เห่าดุ

cards.description: WOOF! Sometimes that's all it takes.

special.name: INTIMIDATE
special.desc: Target enemy loses -1 ATK until end of turn.

name.th: กระดิกหาง

cards.description: Pure happiness. Infectious positivity.

special.name: HAPPY VIBES
special.desc: All your Dogs heal 1 HP.

name.th: พิธีเข้าร่วม

cards.description: The sacred ritual when a new dog officially joins Harlay's pack.

special.name: INITIATION
special.desc: Convert any non-Dog card into a Dog with same stats. Gains PACK.

name.th: การล่าเริ่มต้น

cards.description: When the pack decides to hunt, nothing escapes.

special.name: ON THE HUNT
special.desc: All Dogs gain +2 SPD and can attack immediately this turn.

name.th: มื้ออาหารของฝูง

cards.description: Sharing food strengthens bonds. The pack that eats together stays together.

special.name: FEAST
special.desc: All Dogs heal 3 HP and gain +1 ATK.

name.th: การแข่งเห่า

cards.description: Who can bark the loudest? Important pack dynamics.

special.name: LOUD BARKS
special.desc: Your Dogs with highest ATK gains +1 ATK.

name.th: ผู้ถูกเลือกของฮาร์เลย์

cards.description: The moment Harlay marks his successor. The pack holds its breath.

special.name: HEIR TO THE PACK
special.desc: Target Dog gains all of Harlay's abilities and +5/+5 permanently.

name.th: จุดเสบียง

cards.description: Hidden stash of bones, treats, and toys. Emergency reserves.

special.name: HIDDEN SUPPLIES
special.desc: Once per turn, gain a random Gear card.

name.th: จุดสังเกตการณ์

cards.description: High ground with clear views. Perfect for spotting threats.

special.name: WATCHFUL
special.desc: See enemy's hand at start of each turn.

name.th: หลุมโคลน

cards.description: Dirty but fun. Dogs love it. Enemies hate it.

special.name: MUDDY
special.desc: Enemies have -2 SPD while this is on board.

name.th: สุนัขสงคราม

cards.description: Bred specifically for combat. A living weapon.

special.name: BATTLE HARDENED
special.desc: Immune to negative effects. +1 ATK after each attack.

name.th: หมาส่งสาร

cards.description: Fast and reliable. Delivers messages across the battlefield.

special.name: SPECIAL DELIVERY
special.desc: When played, draw a Trick card.

name.th: สุนัขแพทย์

cards.description: Trained in first aid. Carries supplies in their vest.

special.name: FIELD MEDIC
special.desc: Heal adjacent Dogs for 2 HP each turn.

name.th: ลูกหมาอัลฟ่า

cards.description: Shows leadership potential from young age. Future alpha material.

special.name: BORN LEADER
special.desc: If no other Dogs have HOWL, this gains HOWL.

name.th: หมาขี้เกียจ

cards.description: Will guard... later. Maybe. After this nap.

name.th: ลูกหมาสุขสันต์

cards.description: Always happy. Always wagging. Spreads joy everywhere.

name.th: ลูกหมาดุ

cards.description: Small but thinks they're a wolf. All bark AND bite.

name.th: แผลเป็นสงคราม

cards.description: A mark of honor. Every scar tells a story.

special.name: WAR VETERAN
special.desc: Equipped Dog gains +1 ATK for each damage it has taken (max +3).

name.th: สัญลักษณ์ฝูง

cards.description: Shows allegiance to Harlay's pack. Wear it with pride.

name.th: สายรัด

cards.description: Standard issue equipment. Distributes weight evenly.

name.th: ห้องประชุมสงคราม

cards.description: Where Harlay plans his campaigns. Strategy wins wars.

special.name: TACTICAL PLANNING
special.desc: At start of turn, look at top 3 cards of your deck. Put one in hand.

name.th: จุดเฝ้ายาม

cards.description: 24/7 surveillance. Nothing gets past the guards.

special.name: ON DUTY
special.desc: Dogs here have GUARD while this is active.

name.th: จุดรวมพล

cards.description: Where the pack gathers before battle. Morale is everything.

special.name: RALLY
special.desc: Dogs played here gain +1/+1.

name.th: เรียกกลับฉุกเฉิน

cards.description: The signal that brings all dogs running home. NOW.

special.name: COME!
special.desc: Return all your Dogs to hand. Each returned Dog heals to full HP.

name.th: เครื่องหมายอาณาเขต

cards.description: This area belongs to the pack now. Stay out.

special.name: CLAIMED
special.desc: Target territory becomes yours. Enemies take 2 damage entering it.

name.th: โจมตีลอบ

cards.description: Silent. Deadly. Over before they know what happened.

special.name: AMBUSH
special.desc: Target Dog attacks immediately with +3 ATK. Can't be blocked.

name.th: สลัดออก

cards.description: A good shake solves many problems. Water, mud, curses...

special.name: CLEANSE
special.desc: Remove one negative effect from target Dog.

name.th: ชัยชนะของฝูง

cards.description: The moment when the pack achieves the impossible. Together.

special.name: TRIUMPH
special.desc: If you have 5+ Dogs, deal 10 damage to enemy player.

name.th: การยืนหยัดครั้งสุดท้าย

cards.description: Backs against the wall. No retreat. Fight or die.

special.name: DESPERATE MEASURES
special.desc: If you have less HP than opponent, all Dogs gain +3/+3.

name.th: รุ่งอรุณใหม่

cards.description: After every battle, the sun rises again. Hope endures.

special.name: FRESH START
special.desc: Heal all Dogs to full HP. Reset all cooldowns.
